scroll_physics.original: LocomotiveScroll, high inertia (~1.5s post-swipe), organic easing
scroll_physics.gap: Inertia duration and easing curve lack behavioral parity

animation_timelines.original: Stage-driven GSAP sequences. Preloader -> Marquee reveal -> Parallax bg reveal
animation_timelines.clone: Simple fade reveals. Lacks choreographic depth and sequential timing
animation_timelines.gap: Missing master animation registry and timeline synchronization

routing_structure.original: Internal SPA router with wipe transitions and unique page namespaces
routing_structure.clone: Vite-based routing (Barba.js), functional but transitions are unfinished/broken
routing_structure.gap: Page transitions lack smooth wipe effects and timing precision

layout_positioning.original: Motion-driven. Absolute positioning + matrix/translate3d transforms. vw units for typography
layout_positioning.clone: Layout-driven. Static positioning, margin-based spacing for headers
layout_positioning.gap: Static layout breaks motion-first architecture principles

interaction_controllers.original: Custom magnetic cursor with 'View' morphing. Project hover preview system with inertia following
interaction_controllers.clone: Standard cursor. No hover preview controller detected
interaction_controllers.gap: Complete absence of interactive controller logic
